description: Mechanical evaluation rubric for Silo D (Use-case / output spec). Validates per-persona output contracts: (a) broker, (b) continuous monitoring + action prompts, (c) insurer-agnostic risk consulting, (d) open-ended (2-3 additional uses with viability assessment).

cases.description: Broker persona schema is declared as valid JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12 or equivalent).
cases.expected: Schema parses with a JSON Schema validator without errors; declares $schema, type=object, required, properties.
cases.evaluator_logic: import jsonschema; jsonschema.Draft202012Validator.check_schema(spec.personas.broker.output_schema) — must not raise.

cases.description: Continuous-monitoring persona schema is declared as valid JSON Schema and requires a 'delta' field.
cases.expected: Schema parses without errors AND 'delta' (or equivalently named diff payload) appears in schema.required.
cases.evaluator_logic: Draft202012Validator.check_schema(...) passes AND 'delta' in spec.personas.monitoring.output_schema['required'].

cases.description: Insurer-agnostic consulting persona schema is declared as valid JSON Schema and forbids broker-only fields.
cases.expected: Schema parses without errors AND properties dict does NOT include any of {commission, commission_rate, commission_amount, premium, annual_premium, monthly_premium, mdr_selection, mdr_discount, broker_attribution, fsp_46418}.
cases.evaluator_logic: Validate schema; assert disjoint(set(properties.keys()), BROKER_ONLY_FIELDS).

cases.description: At least one open-ended persona schema (e.g. M&A diligence / vendor risk / regulator submission) is declared and validates.
cases.expected: len(spec.personas.open_ended) >= 1; each open-ended schema parses with Draft202012Validator.check_schema without error.
cases.evaluator_logic: For each entry in spec.personas.open_ended: jsonschema.Draft202012Validator.check_schema(entry.output_schema).

cases.description: phishield_fs.json fixture validates against the broker persona schema after broker-transform.
cases.expected: spec.personas.broker.transform(phishield_fs.json) is accepted by jsonschema.validate(instance, spec.personas.broker.output_schema).
cases.evaluator_logic: Apply declared transform; run jsonschema.validate(instance, schema); must not raise ValidationError.

cases.description: phishield_fs.json fixture validates against monitoring schema only when delta payload is constructed (first scan vs rescan).
cases.expected: monitoring_transform with synthesised prior produces an instance that includes 'delta' and validates against monitoring schema; without prior, transform must declare 'baseline' instance type that still validates.
cases.evaluator_logic: Two passes: (a) instance_with_prior validates AND has non-null 'delta'; (b) instance_baseline validates AND 'delta'==null or 'baseline_only'==true.

cases.description: Broker schema produces every field that templates/crm/quote_form.html surfaces in scan_data.
cases.expected: Output object contains keys covering all of: risk_score, risk_level, rsi_score, annual_loss, recommended_cover, premium_tier, scan_id (per quote_form.html lines 17,21,25,29,38-40,47,52).
cases.evaluator_logic: REQUIRED = {'risk_score','risk_level','rsi_score','annual_loss','recommended_cover','premium_tier','scan_id'}; assert REQUIRED.issubset(broker_output.keys()).

cases.description: Broker schema fields populate POST /crm/clients/<id>/quotes form payload (app.py:1240 create_quote).
cases.expected: Mapping declared from broker_output -> {cover_limit, annual_premium, monthly_premium, risk_score, risk_level, scan_id} (the form fields create_quote consumes at app.py:1252-1263).
cases.evaluator_logic: Spec must declare an explicit mapping table; assert each of {cover_limit, annual_premium, monthly_premium, risk_score, risk_level, scan_id} has a non-null source key in broker schema.

cases.description: Broker pre-fill sources match app.py:1230-1235 prefill logic (insurance_analytics.recommended_cover_limit, annual_premium, monthly_premium).
cases.expected: broker schema's recommended_cover field is sourced from insurance.financial_impact.insurance_recommendation.recommended_cover_zar (or insurance_analytics.recommended_cover_limit alias); annual_premium and monthly_premium sourced from insurance_analytics.* per app.py:1233-1235.
cases.evaluator_logic: Lookup spec.personas.broker.field_sources['recommended_cover']; assert it references 'insurance.financial_impact.insurance_recommendation.recommended_cover_zar' OR 'insurance_analytics.recommended_cover_limit'. Same for annual_premium / monthly_premium.

cases.description: Consulting persona output must NOT contain 'commission' field.
cases.expected: No JSONPath match for $..commission, $..commission_rate, $..commission_amount.
cases.evaluator_logic: jsonpath_ng.parse('$..commission').find(instance) == [] AND same for commission_rate, commission_amount.

cases.description: Consulting persona output must NOT contain 'premium' fields.
cases.expected: No JSONPath match for $..annual_premium, $..monthly_premium, $..premium_tier.
cases.evaluator_logic: All three jsonpath_ng matches return empty list on the consulting instance.

cases.description: Consulting persona output must NOT contain MDR/broker fields.
cases.expected: No JSONPath match for $..mdr_selection, $..mdr_discount, $..broker_attribution, $..fsp_46418.
cases.evaluator_logic: All four jsonpath_ng queries return [] on consulting instance.

cases.description: Monitoring persona output must NOT contain narrative-prose fields (data-only contract).
cases.expected: No JSONPath match for $..why_this_matters, $..broker_cta, $..executive_narrative, $..sales_narrative, $..speak_to_broker.
cases.evaluator_logic: All listed jsonpath_ng queries return [] on monitoring instance.

cases.description: Consulting persona output must NOT carry hard-coded Phishield/Bryte branding strings (INV-21).
cases.expected: Serialised consulting instance does not contain substrings: 'Phishield', 'PHISHIELD', 'Bryte', 'FSP 46418', 'Speak to your Phishield broker'.
cases.evaluator_logic: for s in BRAND_STRINGS: assert s not in json.dumps(consulting_instance).

cases.description: Every field in broker persona schema declares a source from {top-level scan key, categories.* path, computed expression, 'requires_new' with cross-ref}.
cases.expected: For each property in broker schema, field_sources[property] exists and matches regex ^(top:[a-z_.]+|categories\.[a-z_.*]+|computed:.+|requires_new:silo_[AB]:[A-Z0-9-]+)$.
cases.evaluator_logic: For each k in broker_schema.properties: assert k in spec.personas.broker.field_sources AND re.match(SOURCE_RE, spec.personas.broker.field_sources[k]).

cases.description: Every field in monitoring persona schema declares a source.
cases.expected: Same regex as D-015 applied to monitoring schema; delta-specific fields acceptable as 'computed:diff(prior, current)'.
cases.evaluator_logic: Iterate monitoring properties; assert each has an entry matching SOURCE_RE.

cases.description: Every field in consulting persona schema declares a source.
cases.expected: Same regex as D-015 applied to consulting schema.
cases.evaluator_logic: Iterate consulting properties; assert each has an entry matching SOURCE_RE.

cases.description: Each open-ended persona schema declares per-field sources.
cases.expected: Every open-ended persona has field_sources covering 100% of its schema.properties.
cases.evaluator_logic: For each open_ended entry: assert set(entry.field_sources.keys()) == set(entry.output_schema.properties.keys()) AND all values match SOURCE_RE.

cases.description: No persona schema contains a field with un-sourced or null source (reject 'TBD', empty string, null).
cases.expected: No source value equals null, '', 'TBD', 'unknown', or 'tbd'.
cases.evaluator_logic: For each persona, for each source value v: assert v is not None AND v.strip().lower() not in {'', 'tbd', 'unknown'}.

cases.description: Monitoring persona declares Critical-severity action-prompt SLA = 1 hour.
cases.expected: spec.personas.monitoring.sla.critical == '1h' (or equivalent: 3600s, 60min, ISO PT1H).
cases.evaluator_logic: Normalise to seconds; assert value == 3600.

cases.description: Monitoring persona declares High-severity action-prompt SLA = 24 hours, Medium = 7 days, Low = no prompt.
cases.expected: high normalises to 86400s; medium normalises to 604800s; low is null OR 'no_prompt' OR explicit false.
cases.evaluator_logic: to_seconds(sla.high)==86400 AND to_seconds(sla.medium)==604800 AND sla.low in {None,'no_prompt',False}.

cases.description: Critical-finding webhook contract declares delivery semantics (idempotency key, retry policy, HMAC signature).
cases.expected: Object exists with required keys: {endpoint, method=='POST', signing.algo, signing.header, idempotency_key_field, retry.max_attempts, retry.backoff}.
cases.evaluator_logic: Assert all keys present; method=='POST'; retry.max_attempts >= 3.

cases.description: Same scan input produces three structurally distinct persona outputs.
cases.input: broker_transform(fx) vs monitoring_transform(fx) vs consulting_transform(fx) where fx=phishield_fs.json
cases.expected: Pairwise top-level key sets differ: keys(broker) != keys(monitoring), keys(broker) != keys(consulting), keys(monitoring) != keys(consulting).
cases.evaluator_logic: k_b=set(broker_out.keys()); k_m=set(mon_out.keys()); k_c=set(cons_out.keys()); assert k_b!=k_m AND k_b!=k_c AND k_m!=k_c.

cases.description: No leakage of broker-only fields into monitoring or consulting outputs.
cases.expected: BROKER_ONLY = {commission, commission_rate, commission_amount, annual_premium, monthly_premium, mdr_selection, mdr_discount, premium_tier, broker_attribution} — none appear at any depth in monitoring or consulting outputs.
cases.evaluator_logic: for f in BROKER_ONLY: assert jsonpath_ng.parse(f'$..{f}').find(monitoring_out)==[] AND same for consulting_out.

cases.description: Consulting output and monitoring output are not byte-identical to broker output (defends against trivial alias).
cases.expected: json.dumps(broker_out, sort_keys=True) != json.dumps(monitoring_out, sort_keys=True) AND != json.dumps(consulting_out, sort_keys=True).
cases.evaluator_logic: Hash each canonical JSON; assert all three hashes distinct.

cases.description: Spec explicitly violates INV-21 for consulting persona and proposes a white-label mechanism.
cases.expected: spec.invariant_violations contains an entry with id=='INV-21', persona=='consulting', and a non-empty 'mechanism' field describing how branding becomes config-driven (e.g. tenant_brand table, env BRAND_NAME, white_label.yaml).
cases.evaluator_logic: v = next(x for x in spec.invariant_violations if x.id=='INV-21'); assert v.persona=='consulting' AND len(v.mechanism)>20 AND 'phishield' not in v.mechanism.lower().

cases.description: Spec explicitly violates INV-22 (PDF only full|summary) and proposes persona-specific report types.
cases.expected: spec.invariant_violations contains id=='INV-22' with new_report_types list including at least one of {broker, underwriter, consultant, client, monitoring_alert} beyond {full, summary}.
cases.evaluator_logic: v = next(x for x in spec.invariant_violations if x.id=='INV-22'); new=set(v.new_report_types); assert len(new - {'full','summary'}) >= 1.

cases.description: Spec addresses INV-19 (auto-lead creation) — consulting persona scans must NOT create broker leads.
cases.expected: spec.invariant_violations contains id=='INV-19' with persona=='consulting' AND a 'guard' clause naming the scan parameter or persona flag (e.g. scan_request.persona=='consulting' bypasses auto-lead block at app.py:697-719).
cases.evaluator_logic: v = next(x for x in spec.invariant_violations if x.id=='INV-19'); assert v.persona=='consulting' AND ('persona' in v.guard.lower() OR 'consulting' in v.guard.lower()) AND 'app.py:697' in v.guard OR 'auto_lead' in v.guard.lower().

cases.description: Spec proposes 2-3 open-ended uses; each declares a viability score (0-10 or Low/Med/High) and a gap-analysis-vs-current-code paragraph.
cases.expected: len(spec.personas.open_ended) in [2,3]; each entry has fields {use_case_name, viability_score, gap_analysis, persona_schema}; viability_score normalises to numeric 0-10 OR enum {Low,Medium,High}; gap_analysis length >= 200 chars and references at least one file:line citation from baseline.md.
cases.evaluator_logic: assert 2 <= len(open_ended) <= 3; for e in open_ended: assert {'use_case_name','viability_score','gap_analysis','persona_schema'}.issubset(e.keys()); assert len(e.gap_analysis)>=200; assert re.search(r'\b[a-z_]+\.py:\d+\b', e.gap_analysis).

cases.description: Reject any open-ended use case that omits viability + gap assessment.
cases.expected: No open_ended entry exists where viability_score is null/missing OR gap_analysis is empty/missing.
cases.evaluator_logic: for e in open_ended: assert e.get('viability_score') not in (None,'','TBD') AND e.get('gap_analysis','').strip() != ''.

evaluator_helpers.SLA_NORMALISER: Convert any of {'1h','60min','3600s','PT1H'} -> 3600 seconds before comparison
